name: claude-hooks-domain-detection
tags: domain, cwd, detection, cwd_domain_detect, config, domain map, project domain, classify
body: Domain is detected deterministically — no ML, no scoring. cwd_domain_detect matches state["cwd"] against CWD_DOMAIN_MAP in src/config.py (substring match, first key wins). Valid domains declared in VALID_DOMAINS. Map reloaded fresh on every hook invocation so edits take effect without server restart. load_memories and score_tools infer domain directly from cwd (not from state["domains"]) because they run in parallel with cwd_domain_detect.
